auth.advanced.label: Advanced settings
auth.error.apiUrl: Invalid API address. Use a URL starting with http:// or https://.
auth.error.missingToken: Login was cancelled or the callback did not include a token.
auth.error.virtualKeyUrl: Invalid domain. Enter a domain like yourdomain.com.
auth.subtitle: Get an instant alert the moment suspicious activity is detected around your car.
auth.title: Monitor your Tesla from your phone.
api.error.forbidden: Access denied. Check consent or beta account status.
api.error.generic: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
api.error.network: Unable to connect. Check your connection or API address.
api.error.notFound: This action is not available right now.
api.error.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again to continue.
api.error.webCors: The web app cannot reach the API. Check the API address or CORS configuration.

settings.criticalAlertsDescription: Allows critical alerts to ring even in silent or Do Not Disturb mode, when the phone allows it.
settings.dndAccessDescription: Android blocks sounds while Do Not Disturb is enabled. Allow SentryGuard so critical alerts can still ring.
settings.name: Name
settings.profileSubtitle: Local mobile session and SentryGuard profile.
settings.pushNativeOnly: Native push notifications are only available in the iOS or Android app.
settings.pushNoToken: Push notifications cannot be enabled on this device right now. The other settings were saved.
settings.criticalAlertsUnavailable: This option requires a SentryGuard API update.
settings.supportFooter: SentryGuard is free and open-source. It runs entirely on your donations ☕
settings.telegramConnectSubtitle: Also receive your alerts on Telegram
settings.telegramLinkReturn: Come back here after linking your account in Telegram.
settings.title: Settings
vehicle.confirmDisable: Disable Sentry alert for this vehicle?
vehicle.lockedKeyDescription: Add the virtual key in Tesla before enabling monitoring.
vehicle.offensiveDisabledDescription: The horn stays disabled for intrusion alerts.
vehicle.offensiveEnabledDescription: The horn triggers when an intrusion attempt is detected.
vehicle.scopeCancelled: Tesla authorization was cancelled or the token is missing.
vehicle.scopeDescription: Authorize SentryGuard to send a vehicle command before enabling the horn.
vehicle.sentryDisabledDescription: Enable the data collection required for Sentry alerts.
vehicle.virtualKeyMessage: Come back after confirming in Tesla, then refresh vehicles.
vehicle.reason.missingKey: Virtual key has not been added to the vehicle.
vehicle.reason.unsupportedHardware: Hardware is not supported for monitoring.
vehicle.reason.unsupportedFirmware: Firmware is not supported for monitoring.
vehicle.reason.maxConfigs: Maximum number of monitoring configurations already reached.
vehicle.reason.unknown: Vehicle skipped for an unknown reason.
onboarding.doneSubtitle: SentryGuard is ready for this account.
onboarding.consentSubtitle: Accept the data processing required for SentryGuard alerts.
onboarding.vehiclesSubtitle: No Tesla vehicle has been detected for this account yet.
onboarding.vehiclesStep1: Make sure the Tesla account has a vehicle.
onboarding.vehiclesStep2: Make sure Tesla permissions were accepted.
onboarding.vehiclesStep3: Refresh this step after a few seconds.
onboarding.virtualKeySubtitle: Add the virtual key in the Tesla app.
onboarding.virtualKeyStep4: Verify that the key is paired.
onboarding.sentrySubtitle: Enable main monitoring on at least one vehicle.
onboarding.virtualKeyMissingUrl: Virtual key URL is not configured for this API.
onboarding.virtualKeyReturn: Come back after confirming in Tesla, then verify the key.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: This permanently deletes your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
